title: AITier
description: Abstract subscription-tier label that clients render instead of the underlying model identity. Decoupled from the model name on purpose — the tier label is what the user is paying for, not what model happened to answer the request. This lets GP swap models per tier without breaking client attribution UI.

sentinel.free: Server-generated upsell bubble (no LLM call). Distinct from the "standard" badge so clients can suppress AI attribution UI on these rows. Co-occurs with `model: "ghostpour-canned"`.

x-mapping.null: Field absent or null on cached responses generated before the abstraction shipped (PR #79, 2026-04-27). Clients should fall back to the raw model name in that case (or skip attribution per their product policy).

x-appears-in.since: PR #79 (2026-04-27); reports generated before deploy return null
